name: Kirincic Natural Convection Reference — High Delta T
description: Vertical natural-convection plate-fin heatsink reference mapped from Kirincic et al. (2025), high temperature-difference case.

provenance.citation: Kirincic, M., Fadiga, T., and Delac, B. (2025). Experimental-Numerical Investigation of Natural Convection from a Plate Fin Heat Sink with Correlation Assessment. Thermo, 5(4), 57.
provenance.notes: Expected outputs are taken from the Section 7 high-delta-T endpoint (Q = 34.28 W, Delta T = 61 C, h = 6.84 W/m^2K, R = 1.78 K/W). Tolerances are broad because the literature value comes from a combined experiment-CFD study while the tool uses a simpler vertical-array correlation framework.

notes: The paper describes a bare-aluminum passive heatsink but does not specify an alloy, so the tool uses 201 W/m K and emissivity 0.10 as a practical bare-aluminum approximation.
